# kSecAttrPort

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the item’s port.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrPort: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber] and represents an Internet port number. Items of class [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecClassInternetPassword] have this attribute.
title: kSecAttrPort
